title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers presents a step-by-step checklist for identifying and eliminating surprise charges after deleting cloud resources. The video covers hidden costs from orphaned snapshots, volumes, and elastic IPs, and demonstrates how to set up billing alarms to prevent unexpected bills.
